svg.font-family: Segoe UI, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Picks optimal vLLM replica per request
NVIDIA L40S — FP8, 48 GB VRAM, CUDA 12
Inferentia2 — BF16, 192 GB HBM, Neuron SDK 2.28
Trainium — BF16, 512 GB HBM, DRA + NeuronLink
• All accelerators serve same model name — EPP treats as unified pool
• TLS terminates at each vLLM pod (self-signed certs)
• Cluster-internal traffic — no external egress for AI calls
Private AI Code Assistant — Architecture Overview
